allow: Bash(node -e "const s = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('src/store/workspace.ts','utf8'\); console.log\('tabs:', s.includes\('WorkspaceTab'\)\); console.log\('themes count:', \(s.match\(/\\| '/g\)||[]\).length\); console.log\('selectActivePanes:', s.includes\('selectActivePanes'\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const s = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('src/App.css','utf8'\); const themes = s.match\(/\\.theme-[\\w-]+/g\)||[]; console.log\('CSS themes:', themes.length, themes.join\(', '\)\)")
